channel.title: Docker on Anekoique's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Docker on Anekoique's Blog

item.title: Virtualization Systems — Docker
item.description: The canonical OS-level virtualization stack: containers as host processes restricted by namespaces, cgroups, seccomp, capabilities, OverlayFS, and netfilter. Full walk from Docker Engine to containerd to runc to kernel features.
